ideas.title: Kayak or water taxi in Abel Tasman
ideas.notes: Compare time, weather, and kid-friendly options.

ideas.title: Keep a weather window for Tongariro

itineraries.name: Auckland to Christchurch via both islands

stops.name: Auckland
stops.notes: Arrival, waterfront, Waiheke or city recovery day.
stops.route_note: Start north island drive from Auckland.

stops.name: Coromandel Peninsula
stops.notes: Cathedral Cove area, Hot Water Beach, coastal roads.
stops.route_note: Coastal and rural roads toward the geothermal belt.

stops.name: Rotorua
stops.notes: Geothermal parks, lakes, Redwoods.
stops.route_note: Drive south through the lake district toward Taupo.

stops.name: Taupo
stops.notes: Lake Taupo, Huka Falls, base for Tongariro if weather works.
stops.route_note: Short inland drive toward the volcanic plateau.

stops.name: Tongariro National Park
stops.notes: Alpine crossing window, weather-dependent buffer.
stops.route_note: Continue south on State Highway 1 toward Wellington.

stops.name: Wellington
stops.notes: Capital city, harbour, food, ferry staging.
stops.route_note: Interislander or Bluebridge ferry across Cook Strait.

stops.name: Picton
stops.notes: Marlborough Sounds arrival and ferry buffer.
stops.route_note: Drive west toward Nelson and Abel Tasman.

stops.name: Nelson / Abel Tasman
stops.notes: Coastal walks, beaches, kayak or water taxi day.
stops.route_note: Cross toward the West Coast through inland valleys.

stops.name: Punakaiki
stops.notes: Pancake Rocks and West Coast scenery.
stops.route_note: Follow the West Coast road south.

stops.name: Franz Josef Glacier
stops.notes: Glacier valley walks, weather-dependent heli options.
stops.route_note: Continue south via Haast Pass toward Wanaka.

stops.name: Wanaka
stops.notes: Lake Wanaka, Roys Peak area, slower scenic days.
stops.route_note: Short drive over the Crown Range or via Cromwell.

stops.name: Queenstown
stops.notes: Adventure base, lakefront, Glenorchy day trip.
stops.route_note: Drive south along Lake Wakatipu toward Fiordland.

stops.name: Te Anau
stops.notes: Fiordland base for Milford Sound or Doubtful Sound.
stops.route_note: Long inland drive back through Otago and Mackenzie Country.

stops.name: Aoraki / Mount Cook
stops.notes: Hooker Valley Track, alpine views, clear-sky reserve.
stops.route_note: Final drive east to Christchurch.

stops.name: Christchurch
stops.notes: Departure city, gardens, recovery day before flight.

itineraries.name: Christchurch to Auckland with South Island first

stops.name: Christchurch
stops.notes: Arrival city, gardens, supplies and jet lag buffer.
stops.route_note: Start inland toward Mackenzie Country.

stops.name: Aoraki / Mount Cook
stops.notes: Hooker Valley Track, alpine views, clear-sky reserve.
stops.route_note: Drive south-west past lakes Tekapo and Pukaki.

stops.name: Wanaka
stops.notes: Lake Wanaka, Roys Peak area, slower scenic days.
stops.route_note: Continue over the Crown Range or via Cromwell.

stops.name: Queenstown
stops.notes: Adventure base, lakefront, Glenorchy day trip.
stops.route_note: Drive south along Lake Wakatipu toward Fiordland.

stops.name: Te Anau
stops.notes: Fiordland base for Milford Sound or Doubtful Sound.
stops.route_note: Return north and cross Haast Pass toward the West Coast.

stops.name: Franz Josef Glacier
stops.notes: Glacier valley walks, weather-dependent heli options.
stops.route_note: Follow the West Coast road north.

stops.name: Punakaiki
stops.notes: Pancake Rocks and West Coast scenery.
stops.route_note: Cross inland toward Nelson.

stops.name: Nelson / Abel Tasman
stops.notes: Coastal walks, beaches, kayak or water taxi day.
stops.route_note: Drive east to Picton for the ferry.

stops.name: Picton
stops.notes: Marlborough Sounds departure and ferry buffer.
stops.route_note: Ferry across Cook Strait to Wellington.

stops.name: Wellington
stops.notes: Capital city, harbour, food, museum or recovery day.
stops.route_note: Drive north along State Highway 1.

stops.name: Tongariro National Park
stops.notes: Alpine crossing window, weather-dependent buffer.
stops.route_note: Continue through the volcanic plateau.

stops.name: Taupo
stops.notes: Lake Taupo, Huka Falls, easy reset night.
stops.route_note: Short drive north toward Rotorua.

stops.name: Rotorua
stops.notes: Geothermal parks, lakes, Redwoods.
stops.route_note: Drive north-east toward the Coromandel coast.

stops.name: Coromandel Peninsula
stops.notes: Cathedral Cove area, Hot Water Beach, coastal roads.
stops.route_note: Final coastal approach to Auckland.

stops.name: Auckland
stops.notes: Departure city, waterfront, Waiheke or city recovery day.
